narrative:
Radnor Twp township has 1,315 registered voters, with 44.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.2 percentage points.
